rationale: The citing paper’s central mechanism is that crowdfunding increases interdependent self-construal, which then raises demand for social-good products, and the cited paper directly investigates how self-construal shapes donation-versus-discount preferences with multiple boundary conditions. Given this strong construct-level overlap (self-construal, prosocial/charitable choice) and a verified DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.48.5.855), this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
